summary: Iteration 56: UI/UX Color System Upgrade Visual Regression Test - All requested features tested and working. The soft tinted backgrounds, colored icons, and neutral base colors are properly implemented across TapPage and TablePage.

issues: Toast notifications can occasionally intercept button clicks when appearing - minor z-index overlap with 'Confirm Order' button area

context_for_next_testing_agent: Color system upgrade successfully implemented. CSS variables in index.css (.cat-beers, .cat-cocktails, etc.) working correctly. Tailwind opacity-based classes (bg-amber-500/[0.06]) rendering soft tinted backgrounds. Category sidebar icons have colored icons matching category theme. Table status colors: Free=emerald border/green text, Busy=neutral border/text. Dark mode category colors also working.

TapPage_Color_System.page_loads: PASS - TapPage loads with category sidebar, items grid, tab list
TapPage_Color_System.category_sidebar_icons: PASS - All 8 categories have colored icons (Beer=amber, Cocktails=pink, Spirits=orange, etc.)
TapPage_Color_System.active_category_styling: PASS - Selected category shows highlighted background with CSS variable colors
TapPage_Color_System.items_grid_tints: PASS - Items have soft tinted backgrounds matching category color
TapPage_Color_System.category_header_full_tint: PASS - Category title section has proper bgFull tint with colored icon

TablePage_Color_System.page_loads: PASS - TablePage loads with table map, category sidebar, items grid
TablePage_Color_System.table_status_colors: PASS - Free tables show green/emerald border, Busy tables show neutral
TablePage_Color_System.category_sidebar_icons: PASS - Same category colors as TapPage
TablePage_Color_System.items_grid_tints: PASS - Same soft tinted backgrounds as TapPage

TapPage_Flows.barman_selection: PASS - Can select barman from dropdown
TapPage_Flows.open_new_tab: PASS - Can open new tab with guest name
TapPage_Flows.add_item_to_order: PASS - Items added to order panel
TapPage_Flows.age_verification_modal: PASS - Modal appears for alcohol items with 'Confirm 21+' button

TablePage_Flows.server_selection: PASS - Can select server from dropdown
TablePage_Flows.select_table: PASS - Can click on table to select
TablePage_Flows.open_table_form: PASS - Form shows guest name, server, seats inputs
TablePage_Flows.add_alcohol_item: PASS - Can add alcohol items after ID verification
TablePage_Flows.id_verification_modal: PASS - Modal appears with checkbox for ID verification
TablePage_Flows.id_verified_badge: PASS - Green 'ID verified' badge appears after verification

CSS_Variables.light_mode: PASS - Category colors render correctly in dark mode (tested)
CSS_Variables.dark_mode: PASS - Dark mode overrides for category colors working

table_status_colors.Free: emerald-500/10 background, emerald-500/30 border, emerald-600 text
table_status_colors.Busy: foreground/8 background, foreground/20 border, foreground/70 text
